name: Campbell's Paprika Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, melt butter and brown the chicken for 10 minutes or until it is thoroughly browned. Remove the chicken and set aside.
2. Spoon off any excess fat from the skillet. Add the soup, paprika, and ground red pepper to the skillet. Heat until boiling. Return the chicken to the skillet and cover. Cook over low heat for 5 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the sour cream and heat through. Serve over hot cooked noodles sprinkled with parsley.
